AUTO_REPORTS.REPORT_INFO_BODY:
This report includes:
- List of all P (power) elements in the system
- Min, max, avg values for each element
- Power consumption graphs over time
- Output in Excel, PDF or JSON format

Data Source: DB1 database
Info Type: mvmoment (instantaneous measurement values)

The report automatically scans all power measurement points in the selected time range and generates a professional report.
